hooks.command: echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | grep -q 'git commit' && cat docs/.docs-trace.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; t=json.load(sys.stdin); b=[c for c in t.get('cycles',[]) if c.get('blocking',0)>0]; print('\n⚠️  docs-defrag found ' + str(b[-1]['blocking']) + ' blocking issue(s) last run. Run /docs-commit before committing.') if b else None" 2>/dev/null || true
